summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CaseDesk AI refactored backend (server.py split into 10 routers) and frontend. Fixed critical frontend bug where setup wizard was shown despite admin existing. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend login, dashboard, settings, and AI chat all working correctly.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Frontend was checking setup_completed instead of is_configured/has_admin, causing setup wizard to show even when admin exists

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data (1 case, 3 documents)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All refactored backend routers tested and working. Frontend setup wizard bug fixed. Key features verified: 1) Health endpoint returns healthy, 2) Login returns token and user with role=admin, 3) Dashboard stats show cases/documents/tasks counts, 4) All CRUD endpoints (cases, documents, tasks, events) return lists, 5) AI Chat responds in German with referenced documents and download links, 6) Settings page shows admin-only tabs (Benutzer, AI Configuration, Privacy), 7) Export returns valid ZIP file, 8) Role-based access control working (system settings require admin)

login_endpoint.response: Returns access_token and user object with role=admin

auth_me_endpoint.response: Returns current user info with role=admin

role_based_access.evidence: System settings require admin role, returns 401 without auth

frontend_login.evidence: Login page works, redirects to dashboard after successful login

frontend_dashboard.evidence: Dashboard shows Welcome back admin, 1 Open Case, 3 Documents, KI-Briefing loading

frontend_settings_admin_tabs.evidence: Settings page shows admin-only tabs: Benutzer, AI Configuration, Privacy

frontend_ai_chat.evidence: AI Chat responds in German, shows Referenzierte Dokumente with download links

backend_architecture_verified.server.py: Main app (~100 lines), includes all routers
backend_architecture_verified.routers/documents.py: Documents CRUD with auto deadline/event creation
backend_architecture_verified.routers/ai.py: AI Chat with language fix and referenced docs
backend_architecture_verified.routers/settings.py: Settings with require_admin, dashboard stats, export
